code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at_or(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      mut j = i
      let first = byte_at_or(s, j)
      if first == 45
        sign = -1
        j = j + 1
      else if first == 43
        j = j + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if j >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          let c = byte_at_or(s, j)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            j = j + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    let x = get_or(a, k)
    let y = get_or(b, k)
    let s = x + y
    print("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
    k = k + 1
  end
end
